mapper.select: SELECT ISNULL(MAX(CAST(RIGHT(test_no, 3) AS INT)), 0) + 1 FROM tb_item_test_no WHERE test_no LIKE CONCAT(#{prefix}, '%')
select count(test_no) from tb_item_test_no where test_no = #{testNo}

select a.test_id ,a.test_no ,a.create_date ,a.item_type_cd ,b.item_cd ,b.item_name ,a.lot_no ,a.make_no ,a.qty ,a.expiry_date ,dbo.getCustomerName(a.customer_cd) as customer_name ,dbo.getCommonName('pass_state', a.pass_state) as pass_state_name ,a.pass_state ,a.test_state ,a.expiry_date ,a.shelf_life ,a.customer_cd ,a.end_yn from tb_item_test_no a left outer join tb_item_mst b on a.item_cd = b.item_cd where a.test_no = #{testNo}

select a.test_id ,a.test_no ,a.create_date ,a.item_type_cd ,a.item_cd ,b.item_name ,a.lot_no ,a.make_no ,a.qty ,a.expiry_date ,dbo.getCustomerName(a.customer_cd) as customer_name0 ,dbo.getCommonName('pass_state', a.pass_state) as pass_state_name ,a.pass_state ,a.test_state ,a.expiry_date ,a.shelf_life ,a.customer_cd ,a.end_yn from tb_item_test_no a left outer join tb_item_mst b on a.item_cd = b.item_cd where a.test_no = #{testNo}
mapper.insert: insert into tb_item_test_no ( TEST_NO, CREATE_DATE, AREA_CD, ITEM_type_cd, SEQ, ITEM_CD, item_name, QTY , CUSTOMER_CD, EXPIRY_DATE,lot_no, make_no , SHELF_LIFE, TEST_STATE, PASS_STATE, REG_ID, UPD_ID ) values ( #{item.testNo}, #{item.createDate}, #{item.areaCd}, #{item.itemTypeCd}, #{item.seq}, #{item.itemCd}, #{item.itemName}, #{item.qty} , #{item.customerCd}, #{item.expiryDate}, #{item.lotNo}, #{item.makeNo}, #{item.shelfLife} , #{item.testState} , #{item.passState}, #{item.userId}, #{item.userId} )
